name: deep-research-mcp-server
description: MCP Server for the Deep Research Agent — exposes modular research tools to LLM orchestrators.

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Searches the web for a given query using the Tavily API. Returns a ranked list of relevant results with titles, URLs, and snippets.

query.description: The search query string to look up on the web.

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return. Defaults to 5.

search_depth.description: Depth of the search. 'advanced' retrieves more detailed results. Defaults to 'basic'.

tools.name: scrape_content
tools.description: Scrapes the full text content from a given URL. Cleans HTML and returns only the readable text, stripping navigation, ads, and boilerplate.

url.description: The full URL of the webpage to scrape.

max_chars.description: Maximum number of characters to return from the scraped page. Defaults to 8000.

tools.name: summarize
tools.description: Summarizes a block of text using an LLM. Can be focused on a specific aspect or topic to produce targeted summaries for research purposes.

text.description: The raw text content to summarize.

focus.description: Optional focus area or angle for the summary (e.g., 'key findings', 'methodology', 'limitations'). Leave empty for a general summary.

max_length.description: Approximate target length of the summary in words. Defaults to 150.

tools.name: cluster_and_rank
tools.description: Takes multiple text summaries and clusters them by semantic similarity, then ranks each cluster by relevance to the original research query.

summaries.description: A list of text summaries to cluster and rank.

query.description: The original research query used to rank clusters by relevance.

num_clusters.description: Number of clusters to form. Defaults to 3.

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Generates a structured research report from ranked findings. Supports multiple output formats: markdown brief, comparison table, or insight report.

findings.description: A list of ranked research findings or clustered summaries to compile into a report.

query.description: The original research query, used as the report title and framing context.

format.description: Output format of the report. Defaults to 'markdown_brief'.
